description_long: This is a classic rectangular wooden picnic table with two long benches attached on either side, designed for communal outdoor seating and dining. The tabletop consists of several wide, evenly spaced wooden planks, providing a sturdy and flat surface for food, drinks, or other items. The benches are constructed from similar planks and are supported by robust wooden frames that are securely fastened to the table's main structure. The support system beneath the table includes crossbeams and braces, ensuring stability and durability even under heavy use. The entire structure is finished in a uniform reddish-brown color, giving it a warm, inviting appearance suitable for parks or recreational areas. There is no visible hole in the center of the tabletop for an umbrella.
description: A sturdy, reddish-brown wooden picnic table with attached benches and a robust support frame, ideal for outdoor communal seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tabletop and both benches, with the supporting crossbeams and braces visible underneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the tabletop and a single bench, with the support structure partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the tabletop, benches, and the under-table support frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the length of the table and one bench.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by a pair of sturdy wooden crossbeams and braces that connect to the legs and benches, forming a rigid and stable frame beneath the table.
